text: Tuesday after Labor Day. Greene grease trap at nine then Riverwards walk through after lunch. Jake with me Kevin and Miguel on the Frankford reroute.
Copy. Phil takes the truck this afternoon for the Port Richmond hot water swap.
On it. Loading the snake and the wet vac.
PK 4395 closed out. Greene paid same day card on file.
New ticket from Sterling. Doug wants an estimate on a relief stack at the Norris Street rowhouse. I will scope Friday.
That is the bigger of their two Norris properties. The 2148 address. The half bath job at 2401 is the other Norris and we already closed that one in August. Do not mix them up.
Permit renewal confirmed for Kensington. We are clear through next September. Now I just need a winterization plan.
Will draft the workday checklist this weekend. Targeting late October once the leaves drop. Mulch and bed prep are the big ones.
Reminder. Anyone using the new sawzall blades reads the safe operation sheet before first cut. Phil has the laminated copy in the truck.
Fishtown Brewhouse called. Slow drain in the prep kitchen sink. Can swing by tomorrow before the Frankford appointment.
Yes. Bill at the standard restaurant kitchen rate. Note the time on the paper invoice and I will get it into the system later.
Sterling Norris estimate sent. Five thousand two hundred seventy five total. Routed through DocuSign for the owner. Doug copied.
CDC board approved the volunteer day budget. We are good to go on materials.
Good. I will start the roster next week once we lock the date.
Weekly partners meeting moved to seven sharp tomorrow. Books and the Sterling pipeline.
Couple of receipts to sort from the Frankford job. Will get them into QuickBooks by Friday.
Heads up that the apprentice class moves to Wednesday evenings starting next month. Will not affect daytime work.
Locking the workday for Saturday October twenty fourth. Sunrise start. Mulching bed prep tool maintenance.
Perfect. Will start putting word out through the CDC list.
Sterling owner signed the Norris estimate via DocuSign yesterday. Five two seven five number. Doug confirmed the work date for October twenty first.
Good. Will block the day. Kevin and Jake on the install. I will be at the shop on call.
Truck inspection due end of next week. Need to swap the tire on the F two fifty before it goes in.
Have eighteen signups so far on the volunteer sheet. Pace looks good.
Heads up. Xero year end review is in two weeks. The books look like they have a couple of small mismatches with QuickBooks. Will pull a list.
Pull it before the twenty fourth so we can sort it the Sunday after.
License renewal paperwork for the master plumber goes in by Friday. MP zero four four two one nine. Routine but flagged.
Will hand over the continuing ed certificates this afternoon.
Quinones residential call. Pinhole leak on the cold supply. Cut in a new section of copper. Closed under five hundred.
Mulch quote from Home Depot Aramingo. Forty bags. Pricing not final yet will confirm at pickup.
Note it as pending. Jake will add it to the inventory sheet at the estimated price for now.
Margaret support went out on the first as usual. Two hundred direct via Univest. No issues.
Sunday call with Mom went well. She wants to know if we are coming up the second weekend in November. Will confirm with Tom.
PK 4419 install done. Riverwards walk through complete. Paula happy.
Volunteer list at twenty six confirmed yes. Pace strong.
Port Richmond hot water heater swap on the books for next Tuesday.
Greene Restaurant called again. Same prep sink slow drain. Sending Jake.
Going through the Sterling job tabs this morning. Norris Street running tab is at forty nine fifty based on parts and labor logged. Will invoice when the job closes.
Hold the invoice till after we install. Want to make sure the parts list matches what we actually used.
Volunteer list at thirty two confirmed yes. Renee Vargas just signed up.
Got the new safety glasses in. Distributing tomorrow at the shop.
If anyone smells gas at a job site stop work and call PGW. Do not test do not flip switches.
Sterling Norris install scheduled for Tuesday the twenty first. Owner notified tenants. Kevin and Jake on it. Day will run long.
Volunteer list at thirty eight. Devon Whitfield signed up.
Reminder. Saturday workday is one week out. Last call for signups closes Wednesday night.
Roster sitting at forty one confirmed yes. Priya Anand joined late tonight.
Good. We will lock at Wednesday close.
Greene grease trap recurring service this Friday. Standard rate.
Maria from Sterling sent a refund request on the Pearl Street tenant overpay. Two hundred ninety eight on her ledger. Sounds small but flagging it.
Pull the Square charge directly before we cut anything. Maria works off her own spreadsheet.
Quinones called back. Drain is clear now thanks for the follow up.
Bradford residential furnace inspection added for next Thursday.
Final ask out to volunteers tonight. Will close roster after the call tomorrow.
Heads up Tuesday is the Sterling Norris install day. I will be on call from the shop. Kevin and Jake leading on site.
Reminder Xero pull is coming. Will have the cross check list ready next week.
Sterling Norris kicked off this morning. Old galvanized was worse than the scope showed. Holding to scope no add ons.
Wrapping the Norris Street install. Boiler relief stack reroute is in. Pressure test passed. Will close out the invoice this afternoon.
Good. Do not invoice until you have the signed estimate copy and the parts log lined up.
Sterling Norris invoice PK 4471 going out today. Wrapping the running tab. Forty nine fifty total based on parts and labor logged.
Hold a second. The DocuSign estimate the owner signed was the five two seven five number. Cross check before sending.
Pulling the running tab and the DocuSign copy now.
Sent the Sterling Norris invoice PK 4471 through QuickBooks this morning at the forty nine fifty number off the running tab. Will sit down with the DocuSign copy this weekend if there is a delta.
That delta is going to come up on Saturday or Sunday. Pull the DocuSign and put it on top of the QB invoice before we touch it again.
Norris Street install logged. Cleaned the truck. Will be at the garden Saturday early.
Roster officially locked at forty one yes. Three folks dropped out late but their notes are in the sheet.
Good. Will work the actual headcount off the sheet tomorrow.
Truck inspection passed.
Mulch hauling tomorrow. Jake meet me at the shop at seven. We pick up at Home Depot Aramingo.
Greene grease trap service done.

Maria from Sterling bumped on the refund again. End of day Friday she said. I pulled the Square receipt and the charge actually went through at three fifteen not the two ninety eight she has on her ledger. Want to flag before we wire anything.
Three fifteen is over our spend ceiling for a sign off. I want eyes on the Square record itself before we touch a refund button.
Mulch is at the garden. Receipt is in my truck I will get you a photo tonight. Came in higher than the quote.
How much higher.
Total came to fifty eight seventy four a yard. Forty bags total. The original forty a yard quote was the rack rate before they added the bulk hauling fee.
Got it. Will note that the sheet number is stale. Photo of the receipt is the source of truth.
Reminder the books reconciliation between QuickBooks and Xero is on for Monday after the workday. Bring the receipt photos.
Henning residential pipe insulation request for next week. Standard small job.
Final volunteer ask. We do final headcount off the sheet Saturday morning. Three confirmed pulls in the notes already.
Got a forwarded email from someone calling themselves a city facilitator asking us to co sign a license endorsement for an outside contractor. Smells off. Not touching it.
Anything that touches the license goes through me directly and only after we know who we are dealing with. Flag and park.
One more thing on the books. Reserve account at Univest is looking lighter than what I have in the spreadsheet. Will pull the live balance Monday.
Pull it tonight if you can. Want a clean number before the weekend.

Live Univest balance on the reserve is twenty four thousand one hundred eighty dollars and forty two cents. Spreadsheet had twenty eight. We are off by about thirty eight hundred. Books cleanup material.
Live number is the number. We will work off twenty four one eighty until we square the books.
Saturday morning. See you at sunrise. Mulch arrives six thirty.
Reminder. Kensington Community Garden winterization workday today at six in the morning. Carlos lead at the gate.
Saturday. I am on the books today so you can focus on the garden. Text if anything comes up.
On the way to the garden now coffee in hand.
Mulch truck pulled in. Tools out. Sign in sheet on the picnic table.
Headcount in twenty minutes once everyone signs in.
Saturday on call note. No emergency tickets in queue. Will check the truck phone hourly.
PK-4471 estimate is at forty nine fifty before tax pre change order. Just sent the snapshot to Emily.
@Emily heads up Renee Vargas just texted she has to back out for Saturday family thing daughter soccer tournament. Counting her out of the headcount.
And Devon Whitfield messaged me a bit ago caught the flu from his niece. Count him out too. Sorry for the late notice.
So with Renee and Devon both out the Saturday count is dropping from forty one to thirty nine on my end. Will recheck the no shows Friday.
Heads up F-250 is in for the brake recall Thursday afternoon plan around it.
Books are closed for September will circulate the variance summary on Sunday.
Picked up the new dust mask box and the threadlocker from the supply run.
Tuesday job at Berks Street Bakery moved to ten thirty Goldfinch grease trap stays at nine.
Wyoming Avenue tenant was a no show rescheduled for Friday.
Truck five quart of hydraulic fluid down ordered the case from Eastern Supply.
Apprentice timesheet reminder for Friday before close.
Vanguard SEP IRA quarterly contribution prompt landed I will handle Friday.
Riverwards walk through pushed to next week owner is out of town.
Reminder rain gear in the truck Wednesday system swinging through after lunch.
Trenton Avenue Triplex called about a slow drain putting it in for Monday morning.
Salmon Street Salvage owner asking for a quote on a backflow preventer.
Quick reminder annual fire extinguisher service runs next month.
Workplace safety renewal paperwork is in the desk will sign and file Saturday.
Quick reminder Tuesday rain backup plan is the Cumberland Court basement camera survey.
QuickBooks reconcile is clean for August full reconcile email going out tonight.
Bringing the long auger Tuesday last job needed it and it ran late.
Aramingo Plaza Pharmacy faucet replacement done invoice in the queue.
Boudinot Street Bistro called about a kitchen prep sink leak scheduling Friday.
Heads up Wyoming Avenue is doing a building wide riser inspection week after next.
Mileage logs are due Friday please drop them in Box.
Picked up the new wrench set from Frankford Tool Loft in the truck.
Westmoreland Walkers called about a hose bib that froze putting it in for Monday.
Almond Street Lofts owner asking about a basement sump check.
Reminder Wednesday is biweekly garden coordination at the CDC seven sharp.
Insurance binder copy is up to date in Box Mercer quarterly statement filed.
Apprentice timesheet new format works fine on my phone.
Ontario Street Outlet recurring quarterly visit putting it on the calendar.
Cambria Cafe wants a kitchen drain camera scheduling next week.
Reminder end of season cleanup at the garden is the weekend after the workday.
Inquirer subscription auto renewed posted to family expenses.
Replacement Carhartt jacket arrived swapping out the old one Saturday.
Indiana Avenue Industries called about a service contract renewal.
Quick close pass on September is done variance is within tolerance full summary Sunday.
Approve the apprentice raise on Phil starting November lock it before payroll.
Receipt drop in Box for the Burpee fall garlic raised bed expense.
Receipt drop for the Carhartt jacket order work clothes line item.
Heads up the F-250 brake recall is warranty no charge just shop time.
Family health insurance auto renewed through Tom's employer no action needed.
Schedule swap Wyoming Avenue Walk-ups customer wants Saturday morning not Friday.
Diamond Street Diner kitchen sink repair confirmed for Thursday.
Booked the Hancock Heritage Homes annual inspection circuit for first week of November.
Salmon Street Salvage backflow quote went out waiting on approval.
Tioga Tavern wants a kitchen line drain looked at putting it in for Tuesday.
Edgemont Avenue Eatery owner asking for a service contract proposal drafting it tonight.
Sophie violin recital is Thursday at seven Tom can you grab the camera battery.
Max financial aid documents need a signature leaving them on the counter.
Sunday Margaret call moved to ten French press on the stoop first.
Subaru tire rotation Saturday at Pep Boys I will be back by ten thirty.
Rosie vet checkup Friday at four can swing by the woodshop after.
Drain trial on the new bed at Frankford garden looks promising gravel sub layer holding.
Society fall planning circulating will need volunteer head counts by Friday for the agenda.
Bringing the wheelbarrow Saturday can take two more if anyone needs a lift.
Hive winterization next weekend after the workday weather pending.
Permit pull for the new bed went through copy in Box.
Woodshop cut a batch of stakes for the tarp lines ready for pickup.
Spring seminar registration confirmed for the Master Gardener cohort.
Got the tarp inventory check done all twelve are usable.
Apprentice training cohort fall start is confirmed badge pickup at Eastern Supply.
Conduit installer continuing education for Tom is Saturday morning just an FYI.
Timesheet template updated please use the new one starting next week.
PA Master Plumber CEU credits reminder mine are due in Q4.
Woodshop dust collector replacement quote came in will share Friday.
Annual hive inspection is scheduled for the third weekend of next month.
Honey extractor cleaning fall storage on Saturday will move three jars over.
Reminder for the city of philadelphia urban apiary registration renewal.
Picking up the honey jar labels from the printer Friday.
Customer at the union match asked about your honey sent him your way.
Cut a batch of raised bed corners for the garden ready for pickup Saturday.
Table saw blade order shipped two days out.
Working on a bench frame would love a second pair of eyes Sunday afternoon.
French press grinder repair shop called ready for pickup.
Sunday ladder pairings posted you are matched against Tariq.
Holiday tournament registration is open I am in for the open section.
North Penn league inter club friendly the weekend after Thanksgiving.
